description_cn: 使点或直线在指定的半径范围发生碰撞。使有厚度的线（棍）之间和不同半径的球体之间发生碰撞（通过设置半径来加快碰撞速度）
description_en: Causes points or lines to collide within a specified radius. Causes collisions between lines (sticks) of varying thickness and between spheres of different radii (collision speed can be increased by setting the radius).

parameters.name: Radii
parameters.desc_cn: 对象中每个项目的半径。或者将一个值用于所有。
parameters.desc_en: A radius for each item in Objects. Alternatively, a single value to use for all

parameters.name: IgnoreA
parameters.desc_cn: 要排除碰撞的配对的第一个索引
parameters.desc_en: First index of a pair to exclude from collisions

parameters.name: IgnoreB
parameters.desc_cn: 要排除碰撞的配对的第二个索引
parameters.desc_en: Second index of a pair to exclude from collisions

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
